query:
UPDATE establishments SET address = REPLACE(address, ' Dr. ', ' Doutor ') WHERE address LIKE '% Dr. %';
UPDATE establishments SET address = REPLACE(address, 'Dr. ', 'Doutor ') WHERE address LIKE 'Rua Dr. %' OR address LIKE 'Avenida Dr. %';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute UPDATE establishments SET address = REPLACE(address, ' Dr. ', ' Doutor ') WHERE address LIKE '% Dr. %';
UPDATE establishments SET address = REPLACE(address, 'Dr. ', 'Doutor ') WHERE address LIKE 'Rua Dr. %' OR address LIKE 'Avenida Dr. %';
